subcodes.first_line: The Most Exalted Pen beareth witness that thou hast acknowledged My sovereignty, hast drawn from the ocean of My knowledge, and hast attained unto My presence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد القلم الاعلی بانک اعترفت بسلطانی و اغترفت من بحر عرفانی و حضرت تلقاء عرشی
subcodes.subjects: @predictions and prophecies, @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
